title: Create Lite
description: A light weight Create mod centric modpack with a focus on simplicity and server performance.
body:
# Description
A light weight create centric fabric modpack, with some quality of life mods sprinkled in. There are many performance mods added for the best experience possible on a server. The wild back port mod allows for a 1.19 create experience like never before.

## This modpack contains the following mods:

<details>
<summary>MODS</summary>

- Alternate Current
- AntiGhost
- Bad Packets
- Biome Particle  Weather
- Bobby
- Charmonium
- Chunky
- Cloth Config v6
- Convenient Mob Griefing
- Create
- Cull Less Leaves
- Dark Loading Screen
- DashLoader
- Dynamic FPS
- Enchanted Shulkers
- Enchanced Block Entities
- Fabric API
- Falling Leaves
- Fast Load
- FerriteCore
- Forge Config API Port
- Frameless
- Paxi
- Illuminations
- Indium
- Iris
- Krypton
- LazyDFU
- Lenient Death
- Lithium
- Ok Zoomer
- No Shield Delay
- No Unused Chunks
- Not Enough Animations
- Presence Footsteps
- Raknetify
- Right-Click-Harvest
- ServerCore
- Sodium
- Sodium Extra
- Starlight
- Visuality
- Fabric Waystones
</details>
